title: Meet Your Hero
description: Create your first adventure character using strings
solution:
# Every adventure needs a hero!
hero_name = 'Aria'
hero_class = 'brave knight'
hero_weapon = 'enchanted sword'

print('Meet your hero:')
print(hero_name)
print('Class:', hero_class)
print('Weapon:', hero_weapon)

title: Describing Places
description: Build atmospheric descriptions for adventure locations
solution:
# Create vivid locations for your adventure
location_name = 'Dark Forest'
location_mood = 'mysterious and foggy'
location_sound = 'rustling leaves'

print('=== LOCATION ===') 
print(location_name)
print('Atmosphere:', location_mood)
print('You hear:', location_sound)

title: Building Scenes
description: Combine strings to create complete adventure scenes
solution:
# Combine elements to build a complete scene
hero = 'Zara'
location = 'ancient ruins'
object = 'glowing crystal'
action = 'carefully approaches'

scene = hero + ' ' + action + ' the ' + object + ' in the ' + location
print('=== ADVENTURE SCENE ===')
print(scene)
print('')
print('What happens next?')

title: Character Dialogue
solution:
# Create dialogue for your characters
character_name = 'Old Sage'
greeting = 'Greetings, young adventurer!'
quest_hint = 'The treasure lies beyond the whispering caves.'
farewell = 'May fortune favor your journey.'

print(character_name + ': "' + greeting + '"')
print(character_name + ': "' + quest_hint + '"')
print(character_name + ': "' + farewell + '"')

title: Hero Stats
description: Track your hero's attributes with variables
solution:
# Every hero has stats to track
hero_name = 'Marcus'
hero_level = 1
hero_health = 100
hero_gold = 50
hero_alive = True

print('=== HERO STATUS ===')
print('Name:', hero_name)
print('Level:', hero_level)
print('Health:', hero_health)
print('Gold:', hero_gold)
print('Status: Ready for adventure!')

title: Tracking Inventory
description: Keep track of items your hero collects
solution:
# Track what your hero is carrying
item_1 = 'healing potion'
item_2 = 'rusty key'
item_3 = 'mysterious map'
item_count = 3
inventory_full = False

print('=== INVENTORY ===')
print('Item 1:', item_1)
print('Item 2:', item_2)  
print('Item 3:', item_3)
print('Total items:', item_count)
print('Inventory full:', inventory_full)

title: Location Memory
description: Remember important details about places you visit
solution:
# Remember details about important locations
current_location = 'Mystic Library'
location_visited = True
location_danger_level = 2
location_treasure = 'ancient spellbook'
location_hint = 'The librarian knows more than she reveals'

print('=== LOCATION LOG ===')
print('Current location:', current_location)
print('Previously visited:', location_visited)
print('Danger level:', location_danger_level)
print('Treasure found:', location_treasure)
print('Note:', location_hint)

title: Adventure Progress
description: Track your progress through the adventure
solution:
# Keep track of your adventure progress
quest_name = 'The Lost Crown'
rooms_explored = 5
monsters_defeated = 2
treasures_found = 1
quest_complete = False

print('=== QUEST PROGRESS ===')
print('Current Quest:', quest_name)
print('Rooms explored:', rooms_explored)
print('Monsters defeated:', monsters_defeated)
print('Treasures found:', treasures_found)
print('Quest complete:', quest_complete)

title: Updating the Story
description: Learn how adventures change as you play
solution:
# Your adventure changes as you play
hero_health = 100
gold_found = 25

print('=== BEFORE THE BATTLE ===')
print('Health:', hero_health)
print('Gold:', 0)
print('')

# After finding treasure and fighting
hero_health = hero_health - 30
total_gold = 0 + gold_found

print('=== AFTER THE BATTLE ===')
print('Health:', hero_health)
print('Gold:', total_gold)
print('The adventure continues...')

title: Treasure Lists
description: Generate lists of treasures using loops
solution:
# Generate treasure for your adventure
print('=== TREASURE ROOM ===')
print('You found these treasures:')

for treasure_number in range(1, 5):
    print('Chest', treasure_number, ': Contains gold coins')

print('')
print('So much treasure to collect!')

title: Exploring Rooms
description: Use loops to explore multiple rooms in your adventure
solution:
# Explore a series of rooms
print('=== DUNGEON EXPLORATION ===')

for room_number in range(1, 6):
    print('Entering room', room_number)
    print('You search the room carefully...')
    print('Room', room_number, 'is clear!')
    print('')

print('All rooms explored successfully!')

title: Combat Rounds
description: Create exciting combat sequences with loops
solution:
# Epic battle sequence
enemy_name = 'Shadow Dragon'
print('=== BATTLE WITH', enemy_name.upper(), '===')
print('')

for round_number in range(1, 4):
    print('Round', round_number)
    print('You attack the', enemy_name)
    print('The', enemy_name, 'roars in anger!')
    print('')

print('Victory! The', enemy_name, 'is defeated!')

title: Story Repetition
description: Build dramatic tension with repeated story elements
solution:
# Create dramatic repetition in your story
warning_message = 'The ancient curse grows stronger'

print('=== THE APPROACHING DARKNESS ===')
print('')

for warning_count in range(3):
    print(warning_message + '...')
    
print('')
print('The final confrontation is near!')

title: Adventure Generation
solution:
# Generate different adventure scenarios
base_story = 'The hero ventures into the'
locations = ['haunted castle', 'deep cave', 'enchanted forest', 'lost city']

print('=== ADVENTURE GENERATOR ===')
print('')

for location in locations:
    adventure = base_story + ' ' + location
    print(adventure)
    print('What dangers await?')
    print('')

title: Loop Mastery
description: Combine everything you've learned about loops in adventures
solution:
# Master adventure loop techniques
print('=== THE GRAND ADVENTURE ===')
print('')

# Generate party members
print('Your adventuring party:')
party_roles = ['warrior', 'mage', 'rogue']
for member in party_roles:
    print('- A skilled', member)

print('')

# Generate quest stages  
print('Your quest unfolds:')
for stage in range(1, 4):
    print('Stage', stage, ': The adventure deepens')
    
print('')
print('Epic adventures await!')
